name: Oyster Stuffing Enough for a 10
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble the bread very finely.
2. Melt the butter in a saucepan and add the onions and celery; cook until the onions are soft and beginning to show color.
3. Stir in the bread crumbs, then add the parsley and thyme, salt, and pepper.
4. Drain the oysters, reserving the liquor, and heat the liquor to boiling.
5. If the oysters are large, cut them in half; if small, use whole. Add them to the boiling liquor and cook until the edges start to curl.
6. Drain promptly and stir the cooked oysters into the bread mixture.
7. This should stuff a 10 to 15 pound turkey.
